reviews.review_description:
You crash into nothing for no reason In First person. There's no music in menu. Not enough options. No control settings. No instructions T, kind of just throws you in without any explanation. Cops don't do anything they are useless. Other than that it has high potential 


UPDATE : This is the best freaking racing game on VR

reviews.review_title: A really nice VR racer with free roaming
reviews.review_description:
Bought this after reading a report from the developers asking for feedback and listing updates and you can tell a huge amount of effort has been made. I've passed on my first impressions and they've already replied with their plans.
It's already a fun game for a good price and it sounds like they'll keep making it better.
Get it and support the efforts!
The car models are good! It feels exactly like Need for Speed! Interiors are dope for vehicles that have them! The con: when the headset gets overwhelmed, physics behave unpredictably.

When's the next update for this game I can't play this is broken can't play unplayable it's hard to give it five stars when you can't fix the problem need a update the game is unplayable I try to play it it won't let me play I'm still getting thrown out the map like a cash grab I was able to play and I can't play it no more please fix or send an update or something to improve the game from glitches and bugs mine's bugging out right now unplayable I do not recommend this due to this not being fixed if you have problems I'm having and don't get no response or a fix I recommend not buying this game The game will break and it won't be fixed Cash grab it was a good game into it broke I still haven't got the problem resolved you by this game you're taking a risk in the city's too empty no people walking around no cyberpunk robots or people dressed in cyberpunk clothes walking around no animals no flying cars it just dead in a drifting it to be a just cuz soon you drift you and I'm sliding into a wall or the breaking it to be adjusted need more different kind of cars most of the cars on that kind of look the same need some different type of cars The city needs to be revamped it's too dead but doesn't feel alive no people no nothing it's a dead city with cars running around it'd be nice if the cars look more realistic with people actually in the car instead of a blank card just moving around till you hit it and it goes back into position start driving it doesn't feel realistic The cars look nice and the steering is good when it was working it needs better races need more of a open world cuz too dead please send an update the popping world is the one that's broken well go to the open world it doesn't work it just throws me underneath the map and start wiggling back and forth on the screen to drift level I can drive on it's the open world one that's broken

developer_response.body: Please send an email to this address: info@esti.tr

reviews.review_description:
Oh my God I Love you people 🎮☝🏾‼️‼️🔥

FINALLY ‼️ someone made a good Car game in VR.  The graphics are crazy reminds me of GTA when they received the ray-tracing upgrades.

This has actual races, a drift mode, full customizations of cars , free Roam 🔥🔥🔥😎 
Turbo and you guys are adding a cockpit mode this will be epic 


I'ma car fan from the midnight club and need for speed days ..this is definitely up my alley .

I almost thought nobody was able to make a good car game on Quest because for some odd reason they keep on CLONING  and making low tier copy and paste highway car games where you just drive  one direction the whole game smh (not for me)

You guys saved the day Honestly.. Hope you guys keep updating this game and keep adding stuff. 

Also if you don't have one , open up a discord so we the gamers can communicate with you and stuff ..... amazing game and it's just came out ... Finally A good car Game that I'm NEVER REFUNDING 🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥
This will be  a top seller soon!!

thank you guys 👑for the Response.


Update: None of the single races  work, as I can only do drift races. Please fix .and no sound in the menu

Update 2: the Races work but not all the time. Sometimes you drive to the ring and click the race button and it gets stuck in the loading screen

I like it but fix the reflections please, Way to overloaded lol. Steering with hands in first person needs work too. Random 90• degree turns into the wall 😭🤦‍♂️, And First person puts you under some cars. This is a banger though. Update the issues and I’ll pick it up for all the homies too. It will be one of the top racers if you get it ironed out.
